summary: Across the year, the engineer focused on building a SaaS crypto trading platform, developing embedded HID firmware, conducting AI/ML research for trading and poker, and creating various automation and tooling projects.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Developed a KMDF input filter driver for capturing and injecting keyboard and mouse events.

items.title: Mobile app for NZT
items.description: Worked on the NZT mobile app, adding a product flavor and extended system information.

items.title: Crypto trading platform development
items.description: Built out the SaaS crypto algo trading platform with AI/NN features, including quickstart templates, billing, and deployment pipeline.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware
items.description: Iterated on feature-rich mouse and keyboard emulation firmware for ESP32-S3, adding new firmware variants.

items.title: Windows file tagging utility
items.description: Polished the Windows Explorer file-tagging tool, improving release workflows and fixing context menu issues.

items.title: CV and input emulation project
items.description: Worked on a personal C++ project for computer vision, mouse/keyboard emulation, and screen capture.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Conducted R&D on a crypto price prediction model, experimenting with mixture-of-experts architectures and benchmarking.

items.title: Android LLM assistant
items.description: Built an Android chat assistant with on-device LLM capabilities, implementing sub-agent delegation and tool routing.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware
items.description: Continued development on the HID firmware, adding new device variants and USB features.

items.title: Custom e-ink firmware
items.description: Enhanced custom firmware for an e-ink device, adding map and knowledge base applications.

items.title: Windows file tagging utility
items.description: Refined the file-tagging tool with CI/CD improvements, CLI additions, and Microsoft Store publishing.

items.title: Code intelligence engine
items.description: Developed a graph-powered code intelligence engine with LSP integration and multi-language support.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Built a fast, minimalistic YOLO labeling tool for personal computer vision projects.

items.title: Neovim configuration
items.description: Set up a personal Neovim IDE configuration with LSP, treesitter, and pre-commit hooks.

items.title: Poker computer vision tool
items.description: Developed a CV pipeline for online poker, achieving high accuracy in hand and card detection.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware
items.description: Fixed connectivity issues and improved COM restart handling on the HID firmware.

items.title: Task management app
items.description: Built a task management app with touch event visualization and improved user experience.

items.title: CV and input emulation project
items.description: Updated the personal C++ project with new modes and HID click emulation.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware
items.description: Worked extensively on firmware v11, adding new devices, performance modes, and BLE/USB touch features.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding tool
items.description: Enhanced an autonomous multi-session AI coding tool with squash merging and worktree completion tracking.

items.title: CV and input emulation project
items.description: Added USB HID mouse movement and rate limiting to the personal project.

items.title: n8n Claude Code node
items.description: Updated the n8n node for Claude Code to use the Claude Agent SDK.

items.title: Freqtrade trading strategies
items.description: Developed and optimized multiple trading strategies for Freqtrade, including backtesting and hyperopt.

items.title: Telegram bot for Freqtrade
items.description: Built a Telegram bot to manage multiple Freqtrade instances, with a web interface and profit tracking.

items.title: Telegram assistant bot
items.description: Worked on a Telegram bot with API integration and logging improvements.

items.title: Freqtrade monitoring app
items.description: Created a Flutter app for monitoring Freqtrade bots with charts and card UI.

items.title: Freqtrade trading strategies
items.description: Iterated on trading strategies with hyperopt optimization and backtesting.

items.title: Crypto signaler Telegram bot
items.description: Built a Telegram bot that uses AI to generate crypto trading signals with charts.

items.title: ChatGPT Telegram bot
items.description: Maintained a .NET Telegram bot for ChatGPT with long message support.

items.title: Apollo server experiment
items.description: Experimented with a C++ server project using Asio.
